meaning: n.留置权,抵押品所产生的利息
examples: The cesser clause has established that the cesser of liability is assumed co-extensive only with the lien given to the shipowner.
A lien against the property is granted to secure an obligation.
The creditors could Sue or place a lien on a cardholder's house.
Filing a notice of federal tax lien does that at least against unsecured creditors.
An IRS tax lien covers all your property, even if acquired after the lien is filed.
